top_opportunity.explanation: TITAN is showing a constructive and balanced setup, supported by institutional bulk activity, insider accumulation, technical confirmation. This matters now because Insider Trade is supportive, but price movement is acting as a drag. Mixed direction across signals reduces conviction. Signal directions are mixed, so conviction is tempered. Confidence is low, and historical support is weak (0/3 events gave >10% return), so confirmation remains important.
top_opportunity.why_now: Insider Trade is supportive, but price movement is acting as a drag. Mixed direction across signals reduces conviction.
